nasb.text: You who have shown me many troubles and distresses Will revive me again, And will bring me up again from the depths of the earth.

esv.text: You who have made me see many troubles and calamities will revive me again; from the depths of the earth you will bring me up again.

cnv.text: 你使我們經歷了很多苦難， 你必使我們再活過來， 你必把我們從地的深處救上來。

ccb.text: 你使我经历了许多患难， 最终必使我重获新生， 救我脱离死亡的深渊。

csbs.text: 虽然你使我看到许多患难和恶事， 但你必使我再次活过来， 把我从地的深处再次带上来。
